creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
Created attachment 239866
poudriere testport log

devel/libbson is now part of mongo-c-driver - see release notes. So updating mongo-c-driver means that devel/libbson is updated also.

The patch was made by Hiroo Ono (added to Cc list) and I tested it with poudriere - a log file of poudriere is also attached.

I hope that port will be updated quite soon :-)
